subcodes.first_line: O thou true servant of the Beauty of the All-Glorious! The letter which thou didst address to his honour Áqá Siyyid Taqí hath been perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق جمال ابهی نامه که بجناب آقا سید تقی مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @personal instructions, @wisdom [hikmat]
